steps.title: Translate calories per pound into an expression with the weight variable
steps.content: The phrase 25 calories per pound of the rabbit's weight tells us to multiply the weight by 25. If the rabbit weighs $x$ pounds, this contributes $25x$ calories to the daily intake.

steps.title: Add the constant and write the equation
steps.content: The phrase plus an additional 11 calories adds a constant term. Combining both parts, the total recommended calories is:$$c = 25x + 11$$That matches choice D — D is correct.
